customer_feedback: These headphones blew me away. The bass is deep and rich without being overpowering. I use them for commuting and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery easily lasts 30+ hours. Best purchase I've made this year.
Sound quality is excellent across all genres. My only complaint is they feel a bit tight on larger heads after about 2 hours. The Bluetooth 5.3 connection is rock solid though — never drops.
First month was great. Then the ANC on the left ear cut out completely. Tried resetting and updating firmware but nothing helped. Returning for a replacement.
Crystal clear microphone quality. My colleagues say I sound better than people using AirPods. The transparency mode is seamless for quick conversations. Comfortable enough to wear all day.
They work fine for the price range. Sound is good not great. Build quality feels a bit plasticky compared to Sony XM5. The carrying case is nice though.
The headband snapped while I was adjusting them. Clearly a manufacturing defect. For $150 I expected much better durability. Customer support was slow to respond too.
I'm a music producer and these surprised me. The frequency response is flat and honest — perfect for mixing on the go. The wired mode via USB-C is lossless. Punches way above its price class.

review_title: Solid upgrade from my old pair
customer_feedback: Coming from the X300 model these are a significant upgrade. Better bass better ANC and the multipoint Bluetooth lets me switch between laptop and phone instantly. Love the matte black finish.
Keeps disconnecting from my Samsung Galaxy S24. Works fine with iPhone though which is frustrating. The app is also pretty buggy on Android — EQ settings don't save half the time.
These handle sweat surprisingly well for over-ear headphones. The grip stays firm during workouts and the bass boost EQ preset is motivating. Only wish they were slightly lighter.

Compared these against Bose QC Ultra and Sony XM5 in-store. The ProBass matched them in sound quality at half the price. ANC blocks out airplane noise completely. Already recommended to three friends.
The highs and mids are beautiful but the bass can get muddy at high volumes. Comfortable for short sessions. The touch controls are finicky and sometimes skip tracks when I'm just adjusting the fit.

Headphones arrived with a defective right driver. Tried to get a replacement and was bounced between departments for 3 weeks. Still waiting. Product might be fine but the support experience killed it for me.
Just took these on a 14-hour flight. ANC eliminated engine noise completely. Battery lasted the whole trip with juice to spare. The folding design fits perfectly in my carry-on. Game changer.
At this price point you can't complain. Sound is 8/10 comfort is 7/10 and ANC is 9/10. The app could use some polish but the core product delivers. Would buy again.
I mainly use these for podcasts and video calls. They're fine for that purpose. Music sounds okay but I'm not an audiophile. The sidetone feature during calls is handy.
I sold my AirPods Max after trying these. The sound profile is warmer and more engaging. Half the weight too. Only thing Apple does better is the seamless ecosystem integration.
Only had them for 6 weeks and the protein leather on the ear pads is already peeling. The sound is good but durability is concerning. Expected better for the price.
These help me focus in noisy coffee shops. The ANC blocks chatter perfectly. Comfortable for long study sessions and the battery anxiety is non-existent with 35-hour life. Solid recommendation.
If you're a bass lover these are IT. Listened to my entire EDM playlist and was grinning the whole time. The 40mm drivers deliver clean powerful low end without distortion. Absolutely love them.
